meta.title: Sporlo — Club Workspace
meta.description: Multi-tenant SaaS for Saudi sports clubs

notifications.pageSubtitle: Everything that needs your attention, newest first.
notifications.title: Notifications

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.noneHint: Talk to your club admin to renew or sign up.

claimAccount.title: Create a permanent account
claimAccount.subtitle: This portal link expires in 7 days. Set a password to keep signing in.

toast.claimed: Account created — sign in to continue.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.expired: This portal link has expired. Ask your club admin for a new one.
errors.alreadyClaimed: This account was already claimed. Sign in with your existing email + password.

fansManager.title: Fan portal
fansManager.subtitle: Choose what fans see on your public landing page. Sections pull live data from your other modules — toggle them off if a section doesn't apply to your club.

preview.title: Your fan portal
preview.subtitle: Public URL where fans land first.

sections.title: Sections
sections.subtitle: Turn off any section you don't want fans to see.
sections.heroHint: Club name, tagline, logo, primary call-to-action.
sections.nextMatchHint: Countdown card pulled from your next scheduled fixture.
sections.newsHint: Three most recent published articles. Pin one below to override.
sections.squadHint: Four-player teaser from your active roster.
sections.shopHint: Four-product teaser from your store. Pin one below.
sections.aboutHint: Long-form copy from your Media · Pages 'about' entry.

featured.title: Featured pins
featured.subtitle: Promote one item to the top of its row. Leave on 'Latest' to use the newest item automatically.
featured.newsHint: Pinned article goes first in the News row.
featured.productHint: Pinned product goes first in the Shop row.

cmdk.hint: Type at least 2 characters to search.

dashboard.intro: At-a-glance view of your club today. Tiles + charts pull live data from every module.

metrics.revenue30Hint: Paid payments in the last 30 days

tip.title: Tip
tip.body: Hit ⌘K (or Ctrl+K) anywhere to jump to a member, plan, fixture, or product in one search.

revenue.title: Revenue · last 6 months
revenue.subtitle: Sum of paid payments per month

signIn.checkEmail: Check your inbox to confirm, then come back to finish setup.

profile.title: Club profile
profile.subtitle: Your club's name and platform identifier.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Primary color can be tweaked later.

departments.title: Departments
departments.subtitle: Mark which departments are active. Editable later.

users.title: Admins
users.subtitle: You're the club admin for now. Invite teammates later.
users.youAreAdmin: You'll be the Club Admin with full access.

done.title: Done!
done.subtitle: Your club is ready. Taking you to the governance dashboard.

governance.title: Governance
governance.body: Ministry KPI engine. Data flow starts in week 9.

team.title: First team
team.body: Squad, training plans, performance stats. Phase 3.

memberships.title: Memberships
memberships.body: Members, plans, renewals via Moyasar. Phase 1.

finance.title: Finance
finance.body: Revenue, payments, quarterly reports. Phases 1 and 3.

academy.title: Academy
academy.body: Coaches, sessions, attendance, parent reports. Phase 3.

events.title: Matches & events
events.body: Fixture schedule, tickets, gate QR. Phase 2.

store.title: Store
store.body: Product catalog, orders, member discounts. Phase 2.

media.title: Comms & media
media.body: Public club site, broadcasts, newsletters. Phase 4.

hr.title: HR & org
hr.body: Staff directory, org chart, certifications. Phase 3.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Edit your club's identity, domain, branding, and plan.

sections.identityHint: How your club is named on the dashboard and public surfaces.
sections.domainHint: Where fans find your club online.
sections.brandingHint: Logo and accent colour used on the public site and member portal.
sections.planManagedBy: Plan changes are managed by Sporlo HQ. Contact support to upgrade.

fields.slugHint: Set at sign-up; contact Sporlo HQ to change.
fields.subdomainHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Used as [subdomain].sporlo.net.
fields.customDomainHint: Optional. Point your DNS at sporlo.net first.
fields.primaryColorHint: Accent used on public pages. Hex value, e.g. #0a5d3c.
fields.logoUpload: Drop a logo or browse to upload
fields.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WEBP, or SVG. Max 2 MB.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Archive this club to hide it from staff and the public site. Members keep their data; you can restore it from this page.

archived.title: This club is archived
archived.description: Public surfaces are hidden and new sign-ins are blocked. Restore to bring it back online.

confirm.archiveBody: Members will keep their data, but the public site and member portal will go offline. You can restore at any time.
confirm.unarchiveBody: Public surfaces will come back online immediately.

errors.alreadyTaken: That subdomain or custom domain is already in use by another club.
errors.invalid: Some fields don't look right — check the highlighted ones.

users.title: Team & invites
users.subtitle: Invite teammates, set their role and department, and revoke access when they leave.
users.empty: No teammates yet. Invite someone to get started.

invite.title: Invite a teammate
invite.subtitle: We'll email them a one-click sign-in link.
invite.linkReady: Invite created. Email delivery is off — copy this link and send it yourself:

errors.alreadyMember: That email is already a teammate on this club.
errors.alreadyInvited: That email already has a pending invite. Revoke the existing one first.
errors.invalid: Some fields don't look right — check the highlighted ones.

edit.title: Edit teammate
edit.subtitle: Role and department changes take effect the next time this teammate signs in.
edit.archiveBody: They'll lose access on their next sign-in. You can restore them later.
edit.restoreBody: They'll get their previous access back on their next sign-in.

invitation.revokeBody: The link will stop working immediately. You can send a new invite anytime.

acceptInvite.title: Join {club}
acceptInvite.subtitle: You've been invited to join {club} as {role}.
acceptInvite.wrongAccount: This invite was sent to {expected}. Sign out and sign in with that account to accept.
acceptInvite.signInRequired: Sign in or create an account with {expected} to accept this invite.

errors.invalidToken: This invite link is invalid or has been revoked.
errors.expired: This invite has expired. Ask your admin to send a new one.
errors.accepted: This invite has already been used.
errors.generic: Couldn't accept the invite — try again or contact your admin.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your personal preferences. Each section saves independently.

sections.profileHint: How your name and contact show up to teammates.
sections.localisationHint: Used across the dashboard and outbound emails.
sections.notificationsHint: Choose how Sporlo reaches you. Suppressed channels stay silent.
sections.appearanceHint: Display tweaks for comfort and accessibility.
sections.sessionsHint: Sign yourself out from every browser you've used.

fields.highContrastHint: Boosts borders and text contrast for better readability.
fields.reducedMotionHint: Respect prefers-reduced-motion is already on; this also dampens in-app transitions.

errors.invalid: Some fields don't look right — check the highlighted ones.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Sporlo to the tools your team already uses.

hero.headline: {count} integrations and growing
hero.body: Wire Sporlo into the tools your club already runs on — fan comms, finance, video analysis, social, and more. Install the ones that are ready, vote on what we should ship next.

integrations.emptyFiltered: Nothing matches that filter. Try clearing search or picking another category.

request.intro: Tell our team how you'd use this. We prioritise integrations that multiple clubs ask for.
request.notesPlaceholder: What would you connect it to? Which workflow does it unblock?
request.toastSuccess: Request sent — thanks for letting us know.

detail.configHint: Provider-specific config will land here when this integration ships. For now you can install the placeholder to reserve the integration for your club.
detail.comingSoonHint: This integration isn't ready yet. We'll let you know when it ships.

confirm.uninstallBody: Connected services will stop receiving Sporlo events. You can reinstall at any time — your previous configuration is discarded.

common.comingNext: Available next in this module's build

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: What members can buy. Edit pricing and durations here.
plans.empty: No plans yet. Create your first one to start selling memberships.

form.discountHint: Applied to the Store module checkout. Set 0 if not a member-discount plan.

errors.codeExists: A plan with this code already exists.
errors.invalid: Some fields look wrong. Please check and try again.

archive.title: Archive plan?
archive.body: Archived plans don't accept new subscriptions. Existing subscriptions keep running until they end.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Every person registered to the club.
members.empty: No members yet. Add your first member to get started.

errors.invalid: Some fields are invalid. Please check and retry.
errors.nationalIdInvalid: National ID must be 10 digits starting with 1 or 2.
errors.phoneInvalid: Saudi mobile must start with +9665… or 05….

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Active subscriptions, pending payments, and history.
subscriptions.empty: No subscriptions yet. Subscribe a member to a plan to start.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to a plan
subscribe.noActivePlans: No active plans available. Create one in the Plans tab first.
subscribe.moyasarUnavailable: Moyasar is not configured. Add MOYASAR_SECRET_KEY and NEXT_PUBLIC_MOYASAR_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to your env.

checkout.title: Complete payment
checkout.subtitle: You'll be charged for the membership. The form below is hosted by Moyasar.
checkout.missingKey: Moyasar publishable key is not set. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_MOYASAR_PUBLISHABLE_KEY and redeploy.

cancelForm.title: Cancel subscription
cancelForm.body: This stops the subscription immediately. The member keeps access through any already-recorded paid period.

manualPayment.title: Record manual payment
manualPayment.subtitle: Use for cash, bank transfer, or Moyasar test mode without redirecting.

refundForm.title: Refund payment
refundForm.body: If this was a Moyasar payment, the refund is sent to Moyasar and reflected here once they confirm.

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.subtitle: Discount codes a member can apply at subscription time.

errors.codeExists: A coupon with this code already exists.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.subtitle: Money in. Excludes refunds.
revenue.noData: No revenue yet. Record a manual payment or run a Moyasar test charge to populate.

portal.linkCopiedDesc: We've also emailed it if the member has an address.
portal.publicSubtitle: Your subscriptions, payments and member card.
portal.expiredOrInvalid: This link has expired or is no longer valid. Ask your club admin for a new one.
portal.noActiveSubscription: You don't have an active subscription right now.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Revenue, refunds, payment methods, and quarterly disclosures.

methods.title: Payment methods
methods.subtitle: Channels for receiving money. Used as audit-only labels on manual payments.

errors.labelExists: A method with this label already exists.

refunds.title: Refunds
refunds.subtitle: Request, approve, and execute refunds. Approvals require club_admin.

requestForm.title: Request refund
requestForm.noPayments: No paid payments available to refund.

errors.amountExceeds: Refund amount can't exceed the original payment.
errors.notPending: This refund is no longer pending.
errors.moyasarFailed: Moyasar refund failed. The refund stays in failed status; retry from the dashboard.

form.title: Submit quarterly disclosure
form.totalsHint: Optional JSON of headline numbers. E.g. {"revenue":0,"expenses":0}

events.title: Matches & events
events.subtitle: Fixtures, ticket inventory, gate scanning, and live match events.

fixtures.title: Fixtures
fixtures.subtitle: Match schedule. Click a fixture to manage inventory + tickets.
fixtures.empty: No fixtures yet. Create one to start selling tickets.

sections.title: Seating sections
sections.empty: No sections yet. Add one to start building inventory.

errors.labelExists: A section with this label already exists for this fixture.

publicBuy.title: Buy tickets
publicBuy.noPricing: Pricing not set for this section.
publicBuy.noSeats: Not enough seats available in this section.
publicBuy.successManual: Booked. Bring this confirmation to the gate.
publicBuy.moyasarUnavailable: Card payment is not configured. Pay at the gate instead.

scan.title: Gate scanner
scan.subtitle: Point the camera at a ticket QR code.
scan.noCamera: Camera unavailable. Use manual input below.

report.title: Match reporter
report.subtitle: Record events as the match plays. Works offline; syncs when you reconnect.
report.offlineNote: You're offline. Events are queued and will sync automatically.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Catalog. Click a product to manage variants and stock.
products.empty: No products yet. Add your first to start selling.

variants.title: Variants
variants.empty: No variants yet. Add one to make this product sellable.

errors.skuExists: A variant with this SKU already exists for this product.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emailHint: We'll match this against active memberships for discounts.
checkout.moyasarUnavailable: Card payment not configured; pay at the club.
checkout.outOfStock: Sorry, one of the items just went out of stock.
checkout.successManual: Order placed. Pay at the club to dispatch.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Pitches, courts, and venues. Book sessions with conflict-free scheduling.

list.title: Facilities
list.subtitle: Click a facility to view its schedule + book sessions.
list.empty: No facilities yet. Add your first to start booking.

detail.emptyBookings: No bookings yet for the next week.

errors.timeConflict: That slot is already booked. Pick another time.
errors.maintenanceConflict: Maintenance is scheduled in that window. Pick another time.
errors.bookingConflict: An active booking falls in that window. Cancel the booking first.

squads.title: Squads
squads.subtitle: Click a squad to manage its roster and training plan.
squads.empty: No squads yet. Add your first squad to start building a roster.

errors.jerseyTaken: That jersey number is already taken in this squad.

academy.title: Academy
academy.subtitle: Coaches, session calendar, attendance, and progress notes.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.subtitle: Staff coaching academy sessions.
coaches.empty: No coaches yet. Add coaches to assign them to sessions.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.offlineHint: You're offline. Marks are queued and will sync automatically.
attendance.empty: No members in this org to record attendance for.

hr.title: HR & org
hr.subtitle: Staff directory, org chart, job descriptions, certifications.

directory.title: Staff directory
directory.subtitle: Everyone on payroll. Set reporting lines from here.
directory.empty: No staff yet. Add the first profile to start the org.

errors.selfManager: A profile can't report to itself.

orgChart.title: Organisation chart
orgChart.subtitle: Reporting lines (parent_id-based tree). Use the Directory tab to change a person's manager.

jds.title: Job descriptions
jds.subtitle: Templates for current and future roles.

certs.title: Certifications
certs.subtitle: Track expirations. Expired or near-expiry rows are flagged.

governance.title: Governance & KPI
governance.subtitle: Ministry KPI scoring, deadlines, penalties, appeals, and Ministry reports.

scores.title: Quarterly KPI score
scores.subtitle: Tier-weighted score per Ministry criterion. Recompute snapshots penalty + financial-support estimates.
scores.empty: No KPI events recorded for this quarter yet. Modules will emit events as they're used.

deadlines.title: Governance deadlines
deadlines.subtitle: Ministry deadlines for disclosures, reports, and submissions.

events.title: KPI event log
events.subtitle: Append-only log of every event emitted by Sporlo modules. Read-only.

appeals.title: Appeals
appeals.subtitle: Appeal a penalty estimate. Ministry reviews and resolves.

reports.title: Ministry reports
reports.subtitle: Generate quarterly PDF or Excel for Ministry submission.

media.title: Media & communications
media.subtitle: Public club site, news, broadcasts, member messages, and notification preferences.

pages.title: Public pages
pages.subtitle: Static pages on your public club site (About, History, Sponsors, etc.).
pages.empty: No pages yet. Create your About page to get started.

form.slugHint: Lowercase, hyphens only — appears in the URL.

errors.slugTaken: That slug is already in use.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Articles for the club site newsroom.

errors.slugTaken: That slug is already in use.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.subtitle: Send SMS or email to members and staff. SMS sending requires Unifonic sender-ID approval.

actions.queueHint: Once Unifonic sender-ID is live the worker will send.

messages.title: Member messages
messages.subtitle: 1:1 conversations with members. Mark threads resolved when done.
messages.noSelection: Select a thread to view the conversation.

prefs.title: Notification preferences
prefs.subtitle: Per-member opt-in for email, SMS, and WhatsApp.
